title: carduus tenuiflorus var. pycnocephalus
intro: Carduus tenuiflorus var. pycnocephalus, also known as the narrow-flowered thistle, is a plant species belonging to the thistle family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carduus tenuiflorus var. pycnocephalus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
